overall.description: A static cinematic shot of a medieval timber-framed market hall or pavilion rendered in a game engine. Characters in dark robes gather around wooden tables inside the semi-covered structure, with bright sunlight streaming through the large open archway overlooking a grassy hillside. The scene features high-quality lighting and materials characteristic of Unreal Engine 5.

potted plants and flowers along the left side of the hall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval timber-framed hall with characters in dark robes gathered around wooden tables. Sunlight streams through the large open archway at the far end, illuminating the stone floor and casting shadows from the heavy wooden beams. Characters stand in scattered positions throughout the space, some near tables and others by the entrance, with a grassy hillside visible beyond the open front.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, cinematic perspective of a medieval timber-framed hall where a gathering of robed figures is bathed in dramatic natural light. It begins with a wide view of the interior, focusing on characters in dark robes positioned around heavy wooden tables. As the eye moves through the space, the composition emphasizes the contrast between the deep shadows cast by the massive overhead beams and the brilliant sunlight streaming through the large open archway. The scene then opens toward the far end of the structure, where the illuminated stone floor leads the gaze past the figures toward a lush, grassy hillside visible beyond the entrance.
